title: PVP & SMP
description: The most optimized Modpack for PvP and SMP
body:
## Description This Modpack is the most optimized and feature rich for PvP & SMP you will find. This includes features like [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod/), [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/) and much more. If you want features to be added create an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Arian100/PVP-SMP).

> ❗ Disable Distant Horizons on mac!

## How to Optimize If you are not getting good fps here are a few things that you can do to make it run **smoothly**! - **Disable Distant Horizens preloading** & reduce the cpu load (Options -> Distant Horizons (Top Left Part of the gui)) - **Disable Replay Mod** if you don't want it (Options -> Stop recording or untick the box in the top right corner when selecting worlds/servers) - **Reduce render distance**. Distant Horizons will still load the terrain (with a slightly worse quality) to save fps (Options -> Video Settings)
